steps.t: Gúrion is standing near the base of the Hill of Erech. You have arrived at the Hill of Erech and should now speak to Gúrion.
Gúrion is hiding near the peak of the Hill of Erech. You have reached a point close to the summit, and should now speak to Gúrion.
Nerzus is standing at the Stone of Erech. You have followed Gúrion to the Hill's peak, and should now attempt to convince Nerzus and the Ruthless Dead…
Gúrion is at the peak of the Hill of Erech. You have defeated Nerzus once more, but many of the Dead have rallied to Azruthor's side in Tarlang's Crow…
